title: Smoky Silk Tofu Stir-fry
description: This keto-friendly Korean dish features silky-smooth tofu with a smoky flavor and fresh basil for an eye-catching presentation.

ingredients.name: Silken tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra firm or silken tofu can be used, but the cooking time might vary.

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Minced for the sauce and as garnish

instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess water, then cut into small cubes.
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and ginger; stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add Korean red pepper flakes and gochujang to the wok. Stir well until the mixture starts to bubble.
Gently add cubed tofu to the sauce, ensuring it does not break apart. Cook for another 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before mixing with lemon juice. Reheat briefly in a wok and toss with fresh basil leaves.
Serve hot as part of your dinner or meal.
